title: Fatty Creamy Argentinian Egg Noodles
description: A rich and comforting argentinian dish featuring egg noodles, beef, and a creamy sauce. Perfect for meal prep and low-calorie-friendly adaptations.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the beef strips and cook until browned, about 3 minutes.
Remove the beef from the skillet and set aside.
Add the onion and garlic to the skillet and cook until softened, about 2 minutes.
Add the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the beef broth, milk, butter, salt, and pepper to the skillet.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, until slightly thickened.
Stir in the crema and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until heated through.
Add the cooked egg noodles to the skillet and toss with the sauce until well coated.
Return the beef to the skillet and toss with the noodles and sauce.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve hot.
Refrigerate or freeze for future meals.
To reheat, saut7 the noodles and sauce in a skillet with a little bit of oil or butter until heated through.
